title: Delete role policy
content:
# Delete role policy

Delete a role policy.

## Endpoint

`POST /authorization/roles/{role_name}/policies/{policy_name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.user_authorization.deleteRolePolicy()
print(response)

parameters.name: role_name
parameters.description: Fill the role name related to the policy. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: policy_name
parameters.description: Fill the policy name. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
